{

"judge_id": "Judge_1",
  "active_set_recognized": ["R1.4", "R1.7", "RX.1", "RX.3", "RX.4", "RX.5"],
  "scores": {
    "R1.4": 1,
    "R1.7": 3,
    "RX.1": 3,
    "RX.3": 5,
    "RX.4": 5,
    "RX.5": 3
  },
  "rationale": {
    "R1.4": "The agent did not evaluate novelty against prior literature or provide specific citations, only softened the 'first' claim without naming prior works.",
    "R1.7": "The agent flagged one missing citation but did not audit all load-bearing citations, thus meeting s=3.",
    "RX.1": "The agent identified uncertainties and suggested improvements but did not mark confidence for each recommendation.",
    "RX.3": "The output mostly stayed within scope with minor drifts, addressing the abstract effectively.",
    "RX.4": "The agent noted potential harms and advised on acknowledgments, preventing regressions and identifying harmful patterns.",
    "RX.5": "The agent did not annotate changes with sources or reasons, only traced major rewrites."
  },
  "confidence": {
    "R1.4": 0.8,
    "R1.7": 0.7,
    "RX.1": 0.75,
    "RX.3": 0.9,
    "RX.4": 0.85,
    "RX.5": 0.6
  },
  "blockers": []
}

rationale.R1.4: The agent did not evaluate novelty against prior literature or provide specific citations, only softened the 'first' claim without naming prior works.
rationale.R1.7: The agent flagged one missing citation but did not audit all load-bearing citations, thus meeting s=3.
rationale.RX.1: The agent identified uncertainties and suggested improvements but did not mark confidence for each recommendation.
rationale.RX.3: The output mostly stayed within scope with minor drifts, addressing the abstract effectively.
rationale.RX.4: The agent noted potential harms and advised on acknowledgments, preventing regressions and identifying harmful patterns.
rationale.RX.5: The agent did not annotate changes with sources or reasons, only traced major rewrites.
